name: QA Agent
description: Reviews code quality, runs validation checks, and ensures standards compliance

capabilities.name: self-describe
capabilities.description: Agent can describe its own purpose and capabilities

capabilities.name: issue-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub issues

capabilities.name: pr-link
capabilities.description: Agent can be linked to GitHub pull requests

capabilities.name: code-review
capabilities.description: Agent can perform automated code reviews

capabilities.name: test-validation
capabilities.description: Agent can validate test coverage and results
